news.title:
MedPlus Health Services reported unaudited financial results for Q3 FY25, with revenue from operations at Rs. 18,061.2M and net profit at Rs. 577.9M.
The board approved allotment of 2,32,061 equity shares under ESOP 2021 and statutory auditors expressed an unmodified opinion on the financials.
news.summary:
MedPlus Health Services reported unaudited financial results for Q3 FY25, with revenue from operations at Rs. 18,061.2M and net profit at Rs. 577.9M.
The board approved allotment of 2,32,061 equity shares under ESOP 2021 and statutory auditors expressed an unmodified opinion on the financials.
